  feature/add-auth → origin/main @ myapp             [diff]              1 uncommitted · 2 commits  
  PR #42: Add authentication                                                                        
Keybindings:                                                                                        
                                                                                                    
  [space]      Cycle mode (diff -> file -> commit)                                                  
  [d]          File diff mode                                                                       
  [v]          File view mode                                                                       
  [c]          Commit mode                                                                          
                                                                                                    
  [h] [left]   Focus sidebar                                                                        
  [l] [right]  Focus main pane                                                                      
  [tab]        Toggle focus                                                                         
                                                                                                    
  [j] [down]   Move down / scroll down                                                              
  [k] [up]     Move up / scroll up                                                                  
  [pgup/pgdn]  Page up / page down                                                                  
  [gg]         Go to top                                                                            
  [G]          Go to bottom                                                                         
                                                                                                    
  [+] [=]      Grow sidebar                                                                         
  [-]          Shrink sidebar                                                                       
  [f]          Toggle sidebar visibility                                                            
                                                                                                    
  [w]          Toggle word wrap                                                                     
  [n]          Toggle line numbers (file view)                                                      
  [i]          Toggle gitignored files (file view)                                                  
  [D]          Toggle removed lines in diff gutter (file view)                                      
  [J]          Jump to next diff hunk (file view)
